tiktok_script:
Hook: It's payday Friday — and if you already feel like it's gone before you spent it, this one's for you.

Beat 1: Prices are up. We all know it. Groceries, rent, gas — the math just doesn't hit the same way it did a couple years ago. And waiting for that to reverse isn't a strategy.

Beat 2: So here's a third option. Not stress-scrolling. Not pretending it's fine. The Fast Start Bundle from Smarter Hustle Academy is a $37 digital toolkit — built for people who want to start generating income on the side, on their own schedule, with no ongoing subscription eating into what they're trying to build.

Beat 3: Bundled means you're already getting more for less — that's built-in savings by design. One practical use and it covers what it cost. It's yours forever the second you grab it.

CTA: Link is in the description. Go to smarterhustleacademy.com/start — $37, immediate access, no fluff. Let's get to work.
